what_it_does: Implements a deterministic SEED lifter named 'blocks' that parses a markdown string and returns a list of heading blocks, each with level and heading text, using a regex for ATX headings.
observations: The lifter id is 'blocks' and must equal the file stem.
Uses a single regex _HEADING to match lines with 1-6 # characters.
No model call; purely structural extraction.
Returns an empty list for non-string input or when no headings are found.
Exposes a module-level LIFTER dictionary with id, extract, and desc for registry consumption.
standouts: Deterministic, no-ML structural extractor in a lifter registry pattern.
Input validation returns [] rather than raising on non-string input.
Heading regex allows trailing hashes and whitespace.
conventions: Follows the lifter contract with id matching the file stem.
Docstrings explain behavior and design intent.
Uses a module-level LIFTER dictionary for registration.
concerns: Silently swallows non-string input by returning [], which may hide caller errors.
Only handles ATX headings; setext-style headings are not supported.
notes: A minimal, regex-based markdown heading lifter that stays within the 'no model' floor.
questions: What is the exact lifter registry interface in runtime/lifter_registry.py?
How are 'SEED' lifters distinguished from 'AGENT' lifters beyond comments?
Is the empty-list fallback for non-string input intentional contract behavior?
purpose_vs_actual: matches — it extracts heading-delimited block structures deterministically as described.
intention_signals: Provide a cheap, reproducible baseline parse of markdown headings that downstream agents can rely on without invoking a model.
contribution: A deterministic heading-block extractor that can be registered as a lifter and used as a no-model baseline for markdown structure.
summary_for_embedding: lifters/blocks.py defines the 'blocks' SEED lifter, a deterministic regex-based extractor that returns a list of {level, heading} objects for ATX headings in a markdown string.
intention_for_embedding: Provide a model-free structural projection of markdown headings for the lifter registry.

symbols.does: Parses a markdown string and returns a list of {level, heading} dictionaries for each ATX heading line.
symbols.description: _extract is a deterministic, model-free helper that iterates line-by-line, matches lines against a regex for 1-6 hash headings, and accumulates level and trimmed heading text; it returns an empty list for non-string input or when no headings are found.
